item.name: Silent Shark
item.description:
A species of shark that is silent but deadly─in the literal sense, children. In the literal sense.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Likened to and named for a mouse in the Far East, this shark is a swift and silent hunter that strikes before its prey is able to mount any resistance. Ranging broadly, it can be found in the Ruby Sea and all along the continental coastline.
